case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC VS. CORNELIO KU UHU

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC AS TO DEFENDANT KU UHU, CORNELIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $125.00 SERVED AUG-17-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KU UHU, CORNELIO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2016 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 9/23/16 RETURND BY U.S. POSTAL SERVICE LABELED "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KU UHU, CORNELIO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,625.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-23-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CAROLINA PALACIOS DOMINGUEZ--SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
